file_insights.purpose: Custom React hook for content CRUD operations
key_features: State management for items, total, loading, error
Filter support for status, content_type, pagination
Methods: getById, create, update, remove, transition, refresh
patterns: Parameter builder for query string construction

file_insights.purpose: Full-featured content list page with filtering
key_features: Integrated useContent hook for data management
Filter UI with Status and Type dropdowns

patterns_discovered.name: Custom Hook Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: useContent encapsulates all content API logic and state, separating concerns from UI component

patterns_discovered.name: Memoized Callbacks
patterns_discovered.description: Extensive use of useCallback to prevent unnecessary re-renders and maintain referential equality

patterns_discovered.name: Conditional Rendering States
patterns_discovered.description: Clear separation of loading, error, empty, and content states with dedicated UI for each

patterns_discovered.name: Enum-to-UI-Mapping
patterns_discovered.description: Constant objects (STATUS_LABELS, STATUS_VARIANT, TYPE_LABELS) map enums to display values
patterns_discovered.benefit: Single source of truth for UI text

patterns_discovered.name: Filter State Synchronization
patterns_discovered.description: Filters managed in hook state, passed down to page, trigger automatic refetch on change
patterns_discovered.benefit: Consistent filtering behavior across mutations and filter changes

patterns_discovered.name: Link-Wrapped Cards
patterns_discovered.description: ContentCard wrapped in Link component for seamless navigation to detail page
patterns_discovered.benefit: Better UX with proper routing integration

gotchas_discovered.description: Select components use `|| ""` pattern to handle optional string types, creating type mismatch
gotchas_discovered.impact: Type safety slightly compromised; works but non-ideal TypeScript pattern

gotchas_discovered.description: Uses `void fetchItems()` pattern which suppresses return value; errors are caught but not propagated
gotchas_discovered.impact: Errors in mutations won't bubble up, but are handled in state

gotchas_discovered.description: Setting filters resets page to 1, but this behavior is implicit and not documented
gotchas_discovered.impact: User might lose context when filtering; could be unexpected

gotchas_discovered.description: Hook implements pagination but page has no UI to navigate pages or show page info
gotchas_discovered.impact: Only first 20 items displayed; user cannot access remaining content

gotchas_discovered.issue: Potential Double Fetch on Filter Change
gotchas_discovered.description: Filter changes trigger useEffect which calls fetchItems; mutations also call fetchItems
gotchas_discovered.impact: May result in unnecessary API calls in rapid filter changes

approach_outcome.strategy: Two-layer architecture: custom hook for data/logic, component for UI
execution: Designed comprehensive useContent hook with all CRUD operations
Implemented filter support at hook level with automatic refetch
Built responsive ContentListPage with proper state handling
Created ContentCard subcomponent for clean code organization
Established enum-to-label mappings for consistent UI text

quality_metrics.code_reusability: High - Hook can be used in other components
quality_metrics.error_handling: Good - Errors caught and displayed to user
quality_metrics.type_safety: Good - TypeScript types for filters and responses
quality_metrics.ux_completeness: Good - Loading, error, empty states covered

recommendations.recommendation: Add pagination controls (Previous/Next buttons, page indicator) to display all content items
Implement debounce on filter changes to reduce API calls when user rapidly changes filters
Add loading state to filter Select components while data is being fetched
Refactor filter empty value handling to avoid `|| ""` pattern; use proper optional type unions
Add retry button in error state to allow users to recover from failed requests
Add aria-labels to filter controls and aria-live regions for loading/error states
